---
title: "HYP-0013 Metals Flow-Filtered Residual Reversion"
format: html
---

## Status

Status: `invalid_data_construction`.

## Run

```bash
uv run python scripts/run_metals_flow_filtered_residual_strategy.py \
  experiments/HYP-0013-metals-flow-filtered-residual-reversion/config.yaml
```

## Outputs

- `results.json`
- `variants.csv`
- `selected_returns.parquet`
- `positions.parquet`
- `monthly_returns.csv`
- `split_metrics.csv`
- `bootstrap.csv`
- `ic_fdr.csv`
- `monthly_ic.csv`
- `cost_estimates.csv`
- `plots/`

## Notes

This result is invalidated by the HYP-0015 audit. The original runner collapsed
many outright contracts into one root-level last-trade price and computed returns
from that mixed-contract series. Use HYP-0015 for the corrected validation.
